title: BigBasket Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: BigBasket Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with BigBasket Logistics! We are hiring a Warehouse Manager for our Bhopal team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About BigBasket Logistics:
BigBasket Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket Logistics!
